title: Ubiquiti IsoBeam, RF Isolation Shield for NanoBeam NBE-M5-16 & NBE-5AC-16
description: ISO-BEAM-16 is a small anti-interference cap with collar for the NanoBeam M5-16 and NanoBeam 5AC-16 units. This cover reduces unwanted interference from the back and sides. Protects the signal only in the desired area. The interference shield does not increase the gain of the antenna, but significantly reduces unwanted interference and thus increases the clarity of the signal. There are fewer errors, so improves link stability The assembly consists only of sliding the suppression cover on the body of NanoBeam, mounting the "O" ring on the front of the collar and bracket
